tasks.subject: Validate and refine Supervisor autonomous behavior
tasks.description: The "Enable Auto-Pilot" and "Smart Supervisor" toggles are now visible. The next phase is to ensure they correctly control the backend daemon and that AI-guided autonomous behavior is functional.

tasks.subject: Comprehensive Project Analysis and Roadmap Definition
tasks.description: Perform a deep analysis of the entire project structure, conversation history, and documentation to determine the current state, identify missing features, and establish a comprehensive roadmap. This includes updating AGENTS.md, VISION.md, ROADMAP.md, and TODO.md.

tasks.subject: Backend Service Refinement and Robustness
tasks.description: Refine and optimize backend services (JulesClient, Worker, Daemon) for robustness, specifically addressing the 429 rate limiting with better backoff and concurrency control.

tasks.subject: Frontend Feature Parity and UI/UX Polishing
tasks.description: Ensure all backend features are comprehensively represented in the React frontend. Fix visibility/layout issues in the Supervisor settings and enhance the Fleet Intelligence dashboard.

tasks.subject: Documentation and Versioning Synchronization
tasks.description: Update VERSION, CHANGELOG.md, and all instruction files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, etc.) to reflect the latest state and ensure multi-agent synchronization. Create/update DEPLOY.md and MEMORY.md.

tasks.subject: Port Go backend to TypeScript
tasks.description: Port the Go backend to TypeScript with a clean rewrite, focusing on core features and removing unnecessary modules as specified by the user.

tasks.subject: Implement core TypeScript server
tasks.description: Implement a clean TypeScript server using Hono and Bun, including routes for sessions, logs, and settings.

tasks.subject: Implement JulesClient in TypeScript
tasks.description: Implement a TypeScript version of the JulesClient for interaction with the Google Jules API.

tasks.subject: Implement background daemon and worker
tasks.description: Implement the background daemon and task worker in TypeScript for automated session monitoring.

tasks.subject: Configure Prisma and database
tasks.description: Set up the Prisma schema and database configuration for the TypeScript backend.

tasks.subject: Implement RAG and semantic search
tasks.description: Implement RAG indexing and querying logic in TypeScript for semantic codebase search.
